style.name: Art Deco 装饰艺术风格
style.zhName: Art Deco 装饰艺术风格
style.description: 象牙白、深孔雀蓝、哑光金、酒红与墨黑构成的装饰艺术视觉系统。

zh-CN.headlineFact: 西班牙率先闯入世界杯决赛，前沿人工智能监管与一人公司进入政策核心
zh-CN.headlineView: 战争、台风、移民、贸易与领土争议同时重塑世界。
zh-CN.headlineFull: 西班牙率先闯入世界杯决赛，前沿人工智能监管与一人公司进入政策核心；战争、台风、移民、贸易与领土争议同时重塑世界。
zh-CN.intro:
过去24小时，西班牙2:0击败法国，成为首支晋级世界杯决赛的球队；谷歌深度思维负责人呼吁建立由美国牵头的前沿人工智能测试机构；美国国会专门讨论人工智能如何改变小企业和个人创业者。

球场之外，美伊冲突再次升级并推高油价；台风巴威迫使中国东北超过26万人转移；一艘移民船在利比亚附近倾覆，约50人恐已失踪；中国6月进出口增速明显超出预期；以色列批准为约旦河西岸34个新定居点拨款。
zh-CN.xiaziQuote: 今天的八条新闻看似分散，其实都在讲同一件事：旧规则正在追赶新的力量。
zh-CN.doudouQuote: 足球在争决赛席位，国家在争航道，企业在争智能，普通人则在争一个更安全的明天。

en-US.headlineFact: Spain reaches the World Cup final as frontier-AI oversight and one-person businesses enter the policy spotlight
en-US.headlineView: war, storms, migration, trade and territorial disputes reshape the world at the same time.
en-US.headlineFull: Spain reaches the World Cup final as frontier-AI oversight and one-person businesses enter the policy spotlight; war, storms, migration, trade and territorial disputes reshape the world at the same time.
en-US.intro:
Over the past 24 hours, Spain defeated France 2–0 to become the first finalist of the 2026 World Cup. Google DeepMind’s chief called for a U.S.-led body to test frontier AI models, while the U.S. Congress examined how AI is transforming small businesses and solo operators.

Beyond those developments, U.S.-Iran hostilities intensified, Typhoon Bavi forced mass evacuations in northeastern China, a migrant boat capsized off Libya, Chinese trade growth exceeded expectations, and Israel approved funding for 34 new West Bank settlements.
en-US.xiaziQuote: Today’s stories may look unrelated, but they share one theme: old rules are struggling to catch up with new forces.
en-US.doudouQuote: Teams are fighting for a final, countries for shipping lanes, businesses for intelligence, and ordinary people for a safer tomorrow.

sources.title: Spain reaches the World Cup final as frontier-AI oversight and one-person businesses enter the policy spotlight

zh-CN.headlineFact: 西班牙2:0淘汰法国率先晋级决赛
zh-CN.headlineView: 真正成熟的强队，不一定制造最多机会，却能把关键机会变成结果。
zh-CN.headlineFull: 西班牙2:0淘汰法国率先晋级决赛；真正成熟的强队，不一定制造最多机会，却能把关键机会变成结果。
zh-CN.intro: 北京时间7月14日05:00至7月15日05:00，世界杯共结束1场比赛：法国 0:2 西班牙。西班牙在第22分钟由奥亚萨瓦尔罚入点球，第58分钟波罗完成第二粒进球。西班牙此后守住优势，队史第二次闯入世界杯决赛，也是自2010年夺冠后首次回到决赛舞台。窗口内没有其他世界杯比赛完赛。
zh-CN.xiaziQuote: 淘汰赛不奖励纸面实力，只奖励能在九十分钟里把优势兑现的人。
zh-CN.doudouQuote: 两次射中最关键的位置，就足以把通往决赛的大门推开。
zh-CN.footerTakeaway: 今日关键词：世界杯日报。

en-US.headlineFact: Spain eliminates France 2–0 to reach the final
en-US.headlineView: mature teams do not always create the most chances, but they turn decisive chances into results.
en-US.headlineFull: Spain eliminates France 2–0 to reach the final; mature teams do not always create the most chances, but they turn decisive chances into results.
en-US.intro: Only one World Cup match was completed between 05:00 on July 14 and 05:00 on July 15, Beijing time: Spain’s 2–0 semifinal victory over France. Mikel Oyarzabal converted a 22nd-minute penalty and Pedro Porro doubled the lead in the 58th minute. Spain then protected its advantage to reach its second World Cup final and its first since winning the tournament in 2010.
en-US.xiaziQuote: Knockout football does not reward reputation. It rewards the team that converts superiority within 90 minutes.
en-US.doudouQuote: Two finishes in the moments that mattered were enough to push open the door to the final.

sources.title: Spain eliminates France 2–0 to reach the final

zh-CN.headlineFact: 谷歌深度思维负责人提议建立全球前沿模型测试机构
zh-CN.headlineView: 人工智能竞赛正在从“谁发布得快”，转向“谁有资格允许它发布”。
zh-CN.headlineFull: 谷歌深度思维负责人提议建立全球前沿模型测试机构；人工智能竞赛正在从“谁发布得快”，转向“谁有资格允许它发布”。
zh-CN.intro: 谷歌深度思维负责人德米斯·哈萨比斯公开提出，由美国牵头建立一个全球性的前沿人工智能监管和测试机构，在最先进模型公开部署前，对网络安全、生物安全及其他国家安全风险进行压力测试。其设想类似金融业自律监管机构，由行业出资、顶尖技术专家参与并接受政府监督；若发现严重风险，可要求开发者延迟发布或协调放慢进度。
zh-CN.xiaziQuote: 真正危险的不是人工智能太聪明，而是发布速度已经超过了社会建立规则的速度。
zh-CN.doudouQuote: 以后最厉害的产品发布会，可能先要通过一场比考试还严格的安全测试。

en-US.headlineFact: Google DeepMind’s chief proposes a global testing body for frontier models
en-US.headlineView: the AI race is shifting from who can release fastest to who has the authority to approve a release.
en-US.headlineFull: Google DeepMind’s chief proposes a global testing body for frontier models; the AI race is shifting from who can release fastest to who has the authority to approve a release.
en-US.intro: Google DeepMind CEO Demis Hassabis proposed a U.S.-led international body to test the most advanced AI models before deployment, examining cybersecurity, biological and other national-security risks. The industry-funded, government-overseen body could recommend delaying a release or coordinating a slowdown when serious dangers emerge.
en-US.xiaziQuote: The danger is not simply that AI is becoming smarter. It is that release cycles are moving faster than society can build rules.
en-US.doudouQuote: The most powerful product launches of the future may first have to pass the world’s toughest safety examination.

sources.title: Google DeepMind’s chief proposes a global testing body for frontier models

zh-CN.headlineFact: 美国国会举行人工智能与小企业专题听证会
zh-CN.headlineView: 一人公司正在从个人效率实验，变成需要培训、融资与政策支持的新型商业基础设施。
zh-CN.headlineFull: 美国国会举行人工智能与小企业专题听证会；一人公司正在从个人效率实验，变成需要培训、融资与政策支持的新型商业基础设施。
zh-CN.intro: 美国众议院小企业委员会举行专题听证会，讨论人工智能如何改变小企业经营、竞争力和经济机会。听证会关注客服、库存管理、网络安全和文书自动化，也讨论成本、数据安全、学习门槛和监管不确定性。对一人公司而言，竞争重点正升级为能否把多个智能工具组合成稳定的获客、交付、客服与财务工作流。
zh-CN.xiaziQuote: 一人公司真正的护城河不是工具数量，而是把自己的经验固化成一套可以重复运行的系统。
zh-CN.doudouQuote: 一个人加上一群智能助手，不代表不用管理，而是要学会管理一支看不见的团队。

en-US.headlineFact: The U.S. Congress holds a hearing on AI and small business
en-US.headlineView: one-person companies are moving from personal productivity experiments toward a new form of business infrastructure.
en-US.headlineFull: The U.S. Congress holds a hearing on AI and small business; one-person companies are moving from personal productivity experiments toward a new form of business infrastructure.
en-US.intro: The U.S. House Committee on Small Business examined how AI is changing operations, competitiveness and economic opportunity. The discussion covered customer service, inventory management, cybersecurity and administrative automation, alongside cost, data, skills and regulatory uncertainty. For solo companies, the strategic question is how to connect multiple AI tools into dependable sales, delivery, support and financial workflows.
en-US.xiaziQuote: A one-person company’s real moat is not the number of tools it uses, but the system that turns personal expertise into repeatable delivery.
en-US.doudouQuote: One person with many AI assistants still needs management skills—it is simply a team that cannot be seen.

sources.title: The U.S. Congress holds a hearing on AI and small business
sources.publisher: U.S. House Committee on Small Business

zh-CN.headlineFact: 美伊再次互相发动袭击，美国恢复对伊朗港口的海上封锁
zh-CN.headlineView: 霍尔木兹海峡正从能源通道变成全球经济的收费站与火药桶。
zh-CN.headlineFull: 美伊再次互相发动袭击，美国恢复对伊朗港口的海上封锁；霍尔木兹海峡正从能源通道变成全球经济的收费站与火药桶。
zh-CN.intro: 美国再次对伊朗发动军事打击，伊朗以导弹和无人机回应，地区冲突重新升级。美国恢复针对伊朗港口的海上封锁，但特朗普随后淡化此前向过往船只收取安全费用的提议。市场担忧中东原油运输进一步受影响，国际油价上涨约2%，达到近一个月高位。
zh-CN.xiaziQuote: 全球化最昂贵的时刻，就是一条所有人都依赖的航道，突然变成少数人的谈判筹码。
zh-CN.doudouQuote: 海峡没有变窄，但冲突让每一艘船的路都变得更贵了。

en-US.headlineFact: The United States and Iran exchange new attacks as Washington restores its blockade of Iranian ports
en-US.headlineView: the Strait of Hormuz is becoming both a global tollgate and a flashpoint.
en-US.headlineFull: The United States and Iran exchange new attacks as Washington restores its blockade of Iranian ports; the Strait of Hormuz is becoming both a global tollgate and a flashpoint.
en-US.intro: The United States carried out new strikes against Iran, while Tehran responded with missiles and drones. Washington restored a naval blockade of Iranian ports, although President Trump stepped back from an earlier proposal to charge vessels for protected passage. Oil rose about 2% to a one-month high as markets assessed possible disruptions.
en-US.xiaziQuote: Globalization becomes most expensive when a route everyone depends on becomes bargaining power for a few.
en-US.doudouQuote: The strait has not become narrower, but conflict has made every journey through it more expensive.

sources.title: The United States and Iran exchange new attacks as Washington restores its blockade of Iranian ports

zh-CN.headlineFact: 台风巴威造成中国东北严重洪灾，超过26万人紧急转移
zh-CN.headlineView: 极端天气真正考验的，不是预报能力，而是城市能否在预报之后迅速行动。
zh-CN.headlineFull: 台风巴威造成中国东北严重洪灾，超过26万人紧急转移；极端天气真正考验的，不是预报能力，而是城市能否在预报之后迅速行动。
zh-CN.intro: 台风巴威携带大量水汽进入中国东北，辽宁省超过26万人被转移。沈阳、吉林等地出现严重积水和交通中断，学校及培训机构暂停上课，部分公共设施被洪水冲走。随着风暴移动速度下降并向朝鲜半岛方向移动，部分地区仍面临持续强降雨和次生灾害风险。
zh-CN.xiaziQuote: 灾害的强度由自然决定，伤害的大小却往往取决于基础设施和响应速度。
zh-CN.doudouQuote: 预报告诉你雨要来，真正救人的，是提前转移、停课和关闭危险道路。

en-US.headlineFact: Typhoon Bavi brings severe flooding to northeastern China and forces more than 260,000 people to evacuate
en-US.headlineView: the real test is whether cities can act after receiving a warning.
en-US.headlineFull: Typhoon Bavi brings severe flooding to northeastern China and forces more than 260,000 people to evacuate; the real test is whether cities can act after receiving a warning.
en-US.intro: Typhoon Bavi carried tropical moisture into northeastern China, forcing more than 260,000 people to leave their homes in Liaoning. Flooding disrupted transport and suspended classes. As the storm slows and moves toward the Korean Peninsula, prolonged rainfall and secondary disasters remain a concern.
en-US.xiaziQuote: Nature determines the strength of a storm, but infrastructure and response speed often determine the scale of the damage.
en-US.doudouQuote: Forecasts tell people that rain is coming. Evacuations, school closures and blocked roads are what save lives.

sources.title: Typhoon Bavi brings severe flooding to northeastern China and forces more than 260,000 people to evacuate

zh-CN.headlineFact: 移民船在利比亚附近海域倾覆，约50人恐已失踪
zh-CN.headlineView: 当合法迁徙通道被堵住，大海就会成为最残酷的中介。
zh-CN.headlineFull: 移民船在利比亚附近海域倾覆，约50人恐已失踪；当合法迁徙通道被堵住，大海就会成为最残酷的中介。
zh-CN.intro: 一艘载有移民的木船在利比亚东部海岸附近倾覆。当地安全部门称，救援人员在靠近巴尔达岛的海域救起10名幸存者，但约50人，包括妇女和儿童，仍然下落不明，恐已葬身海中。地中海移民路线长期受到走私网络、超载船只、天气变化和救援资源不足影响。
zh-CN.xiaziQuote: 人不会因为喜欢危险而登上破船，他们只是认为留下来的风险更大。
zh-CN.doudouQuote: 新闻里的“失踪人数”，在另一个家庭里，可能就是再也等不到的人。

en-US.headlineFact: A migrant boat capsizes off Libya, with about 50 people feared missing
en-US.headlineView: when legal routes close, the sea becomes the cruelest intermediary.
en-US.headlineFull: A migrant boat capsizes off Libya, with about 50 people feared missing; when legal routes close, the sea becomes the cruelest intermediary.
en-US.intro: A wooden vessel carrying migrants capsized off Libya’s eastern coast. Rescuers found 10 survivors near El-Bardaa Island, while roughly 50 others—including women and children—remained missing and were feared dead. Mediterranean routes continue to expose passengers to overcrowding, trafficking, changing weather and limited rescue capacity.
en-US.xiaziQuote: People do not board unsafe boats because they enjoy danger. They do it because staying appears even more dangerous.
en-US.doudouQuote: A missing-person figure in a headline may be someone another family will wait for forever.

sources.title: A migrant boat capsizes off Libya, with about 50 people feared missing

zh-CN.headlineFact: 中国6月出口同比增长27%，进口增长36%
zh-CN.headlineView: 贸易数字越亮眼，越需要分清增长来自真实需求、价格上涨，还是提前备货。
zh-CN.headlineFull: 中国6月出口同比增长27%，进口增长36%；贸易数字越亮眼，越需要分清增长来自真实需求、价格上涨，还是提前备货。
zh-CN.intro: 中国海关公布的美元计价数据显示，6月出口同比增长27%，高于市场预期和5月增速；进口同比增长36%，月度贸易顺差扩大至约1256亿美元。上半年中国货物贸易总额同比增长16.9%，首次在同期突破25万亿元人民币；外部贸易壁垒、能源价格和国内需求将决定增速能否持续。
zh-CN.xiaziQuote: 出口增长证明制造能力仍然强大，但真正健康的经济不能只依靠别人不断下单。
zh-CN.doudouQuote: 订单变多是好消息，钱包愿不愿意在国内打开，同样重要。

en-US.headlineFact: China’s June exports rise 27% and imports increase 36%
en-US.headlineView: strong trade figures still need to be separated into real demand, higher prices and advance purchasing.
en-US.headlineFull: China’s June exports rise 27% and imports increase 36%; strong trade figures still need to be separated into real demand, higher prices and advance purchasing.
en-US.intro: Chinese customs data showed dollar-denominated exports rising 27% year on year in June and imports increasing 36%, while the trade surplus widened to about $125.6 billion. First-half goods trade increased 16.9%, exceeding 25 trillion yuan for the first time in the same reporting period.
en-US.xiaziQuote: Export growth demonstrates manufacturing strength, but a healthy economy cannot rely only on other countries continuing to place orders.
en-US.doudouQuote: More orders are good news. Whether consumers at home are willing to open their wallets matters just as much.

sources.title: China’s June exports rise 27% and imports increase 36%

zh-CN.headlineFact: 以色列批准为约旦河西岸34个新定居点拨款
zh-CN.headlineView: 地图上的每一次扩张，都会让未来谈判桌上的空间更小。
zh-CN.headlineFull: 以色列批准为约旦河西岸34个新定居点拨款；地图上的每一次扩张，都会让未来谈判桌上的空间更小。
zh-CN.intro: 以色列安全内阁批准约13亿谢克尔资金，用于在约旦河西岸建设34个新定居点，并计划追加道路等基础设施投入。以色列财政部长称，这些项目将使其任期内推动建立的定居点总数达到103个。联合国、巴勒斯坦方面及多数国家认为相关定居点违反国际法并阻碍“两国方案”，以色列政府对此持不同立场。
zh-CN.xiaziQuote: 和平谈判最怕的不是双方暂时不说话，而是一方不断改变谈判对象本身。
zh-CN.doudouQuote: 土地不会在新闻里移动，但道路、房屋和围栏会让地图一天一天变得不同。

en-US.headlineFact: Israel approves funding for 34 new West Bank settlements
en-US.headlineView: every expansion on the map leaves less room at a future negotiating table.
en-US.headlineFull: Israel approves funding for 34 new West Bank settlements; every expansion on the map leaves less room at a future negotiating table.
en-US.intro: Israel’s security cabinet approved about 1.3 billion shekels for 34 new settlements in the occupied West Bank, with additional infrastructure and road funding planned. The United Nations, Palestinians and most governments consider the settlements illegal under international law and an obstacle to a two-state solution, a position disputed by Israel.
en-US.xiaziQuote: The greatest danger to peace talks is not temporary silence, but one side continuously changing the subject of the negotiation itself.
en-US.doudouQuote: Land does not move inside a headline, but roads, houses and barriers can change the map day by day.

sources.title: Israel approves funding for 34 new West Bank settlements
